body:
## Status Updates & Quick Links
Link to [fusaka hive tests](https://hive.ethpandaops.io/#/group/fusaka)
The current meta EIP: https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7607
The discussion thread: https://ethereum-magicians.org/t/eip-7607-fusaka-meta-eip/18439

## Description
This is a tracking issue for the changes we need to make for the osaka hardfork.
- [x] Introduce `engine_getBlobsV2` which uses cell proofs (see https://hackmd.io/@jimmygchen/HkUpFliYJx)
- [x] Introduce `CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB` constant
- [x] PeerDAS Blob transaction validation changes (see https://hackmd.io/@fradamt/mempool-change)
- [x] #14979

Other PeerDAS resources:
* https://hackmd.io/@jimmygchen/HkUpFliYJx

## Dependencies
* release https://github.com/alloy-rs/hardforks/pull/40
* integrate https://github.com/alloy-rs/evm/pull/165
* integrate https://github.com/alloy-rs/alloy/pull/2821
* merge https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/pull/18043

labels.description: An issue that collects information about a broad development initiative
labels.name: C-tracking-issue

labels.description: Related to the Osaka network upgrade
labels.name: E-osaka

body:
# Implement FOCIL (Fork-choice Enforced Inclusion Lists) in Reth

## Required Steps

- Add the ILs to `PayloadAttributes` and new Engine APIs 
  - Branch: https://github.com/PelleKrab/alloy/tree/focil

- Implement `InvalidInclusionList` error and helpers 
  - Branch: https://github.com/PelleKrab/evm/tree/focil

- Implement new engine API methods:`engine_newPayloadV5`, `engine_getInclusionListV1`, `engine_forkchoiceUpdatedV4`
  - Branch: https://github.com/PelleKrab/reth/tree/focil_impl

## WIP

- Add test for IL validation logic
- Rebase onto Osaka, then Amsterdam for inter-op testing
- Clean-up / optimizing

## Resources

- EC Spec PR: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/pull/1349 
- Execution API PR: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/609


### Additional context

_No response_

body:
fixes `consume-engine tests/osaka` eest failures, for instance in `tests/osaka/eip7825_transaction_gas_limit_cap/test_tx_gas_limit::py::test_tx_gas_limit_cap_access_list_with_diff_addr[fork_Osaka-blockchain_test_engine_from_state_test-exceed_tx_gas_li
  mit_True-correct_intrinsic_cost_in_transaction_gas_limit_True]-reth FAILED [1/1]`:

```
 =================================== FAILURES ===================================
  _ tests/osaka/eip7825_transaction_gas_limit_cap/test_tx_gas_limit.py::test_tx_gas_limit_cap_access_list_with_diff_addr[fork_Osaka-blockchain_test_engine_from_state_test-exceed_tx_gas_l
  imit_True-correct_intrinsic_cost_in_transaction_gas_limit_True]-reth _
  src/pytest_plugins/consume/simulators/simulator_logic/test_via_engine.py:126: in test_blockchain_via_engine
      raise LoggedError(message)
  E   pytest_plugins.consume.simulators.simulator_logic.test_via_engine.LoggedError: Undefined exception message: expected exception: "TransactionException.GAS_LIMIT_EXCEEDS_MAXIMUM",
  returned exception: "transaction 0xd1d93e2014af0a1f0b52642b7a9ffb882f4631b03a75f33291e70b557605bdbf gas limit 16778100 exceeds maximum 16777216" (mapper: "RethExceptionMapper")
```  

successful execution from this branch: https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/actions/runs/17827583370/job/50685994149

body:
### Describe the feature

https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/blob/main/src/engine/osaka.md#update-the-methods-of-previous-forks

> For the following methods:

>[engine_getBlobsV1](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/blob/main/src/engine/cancun.md#engine_getblobsv1)
a validation MUST be added:

> Client software MUST return -38005: Unsupported fork error if the Osaka fork has been activated.


we need to check if osaka is already activated here:

https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/blob/aeaa8ec5a2cea0172af3f1cbab920b3be76e8ce9/crates/rpc/rpc-engine-api/src/engine_api.rs#L752-L758


similar to other validations:

https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/blob/aeaa8ec5a2cea0172af3f1cbab920b3be76e8ce9/crates/rpc/rpc-engine-api/src/engine_api.rs#L717-L717

### Additional context

_No response_

body: Adds pre-execution (already exists in revm) validation similar to the other EL clients to save resources by not trying to execute transactions that exceed the maximum gas limit defined by EIP-7825. Introduces a new ConsensusError variant for transactions exceeding this limit.

body:
### Describe the feature

This currently requires additional trait bounds

https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/blob/001fb927b52a2b8f4a76198deae615d34a9c8260/crates/ethereum/evm/src/config.rs#L15-L23

just for the panic fallback

https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/blob/001fb927b52a2b8f4a76198deae615d34a9c8260/crates/ethereum/evm/src/config.rs#L92-L95

we can expect that at least the frontier spec is active, we assume something similar for the op variant:


https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/blob/001fb927b52a2b8f4a76198deae615d34a9c8260/crates/optimism/evm/src/config.rs#L54-L56


so we can simplify this by just using `EthereumHardforks` trait for this

## TODO
* remove `EthChainSpec + Hardforks`
* adjust `.fork().active` calls with the dedicated `is_<osaka|..>active_at<timestamp|block>` calls or 
```
fn is_ethereum_fork_active_at_block(&self, fork: EthereumHardfork, block_number: u64) -> bool {
        self.ethereum_fork_activation(fork).active_at_block(block_number)
    }
```
We're missing some functions so we can add those to https://github.com/alloy-rs/hardforks/blob/cf2cdc868fd9e22eb15840e5c2cfa54ca4727040/crates/hardforks/src/hardfork/ethereum.rs#L605
* remove panic https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/blob/001fb927b52a2b8f4a76198deae615d34a9c8260/crates/ethereum/evm/src/config.rs#L92-L95


### Additional context

_No response_

body:
**This PR adds CLI flags to override hardfork activation points (e.g., `--override.prague`, `--override.cancun`).**

These overrides are useful for testing different fork conditions without modifying the chain spec. Similar flags exist in geth and op-geth, and are now available in Reth via `RollupArgs` and a new `HardforkOverridesArgs` struct.







[#165](https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/issues/16523)
title: FEAT: Add --override.<hardfork> cli args
